feed.title: AO3 - Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Lie Lie Lie
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 246,900Chapters: 87/100Kudos: 1,167

Summary: Marinette Dupain-Cheng had a grand falling out with Adrien. He had learned the truth, that his father was Hawk Moth and his girlfriend had kept this secret. Chrysalis was dead,her life was spiraling out of despair. Her Maman let her leave with her Uncle Wang, but not to Shanghai. Hey, there is another restaurant opening in Gotham, and Uncle Wang needed a helper. Goodbye, City of Love, and welcome, Capital City of Crime. __________________________________________________________________ Damian Wayne does not get “dumped”. However, given the Wayne Gala is close and his brothers plan to make fun of his being alone, Damian needs a plan of action: a pretend girlfriend. The target? His friend, Maps Mizoguchi. Approaching the raven-haired under the tree, he gives the order for a romantic alliance. But when the girl turns around, it’s not Maps. It’s a confused French transfer student holding a macaron. A lesser man would apologize for the mistake. Damian Wayne? He doubles down. She has the right hair. She is a variable he can control. “You,” he decides, refusing to admit error. “You are an acceptable substitute. Don’t be late.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Bandaids don't fix bulletholes.
entry.summary:
Author: MioShiTomioka

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,435Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 170

Summary: Growing up in a home without anyone there to support you isn’t easy. She had to learn that the hard way, however being sent to the most dangerous city in the world to attend the academy there was a new low even for her family. It was like they wanted her to get killed by someone like the joker! Comment moderation on to stop bots

entry.title: Damian’s new Dark League of Assassins
entry.summary:
Author: Komneid128

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,246Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Damian Wayne was never meant to abandon the League of Assassins ideals nor did he truly want to. While the world believes he chose a different path with Batman, a different way to do things but Damian remained tethered to its legacy, waiting. Now, Armed with Wayne resources and the ruthless discipline of the League, Damian sets out to fulfill that destiny at last. Make a new better League and only one force truly stands in his way: the Justice League. This version of Damian is darker, more calculating, and far more dangerous every move deliberate, every alliance strategic. At one point, Marinette is merely another piece in his carefully constructed plan, a means to an end. But what begins as manipulation slowly transforms into something genuine.Against his own expectations, Damian falls in love.And Marinette becomes not just his weakness but his future queen.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug

entry.title: The Shadow Queen of Wayne Enterprises
entry.summary:
Author: Hero_Iron_Dad

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,717Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 212

Summary: Ten years of marriage to Damian Wayne has taught Marinette one thing: Gotham’s elite are nothing compared to the ghosts of her past in Paris.When Marinette stops by Wayne Enterprises to bring her husband lunch, she expects nothing more than a quick chat with the staff and a quiet moment with Damian. She doesn’t expect to run into the trio that once made her life a living hell. Adrien, Alya, and Lila are in Gotham, desperate for a contract and still convinced that Marinette is the same "bakery girl" they can push around.But Marinette is no longer the girl who hides. She is the head of the MDC empire, a woman who commands respect, and the wife of a man who does not take kindly to his Queen being insulted. Lila Rossi is about to learn that in Wayne Enterprises, lies don't just fall apart—they get you blacklisted.OrDaminette. Marinette come to Wayne enterprices to give her husband lunch.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Tangled in Claws & Stars
entry.summary:
Author: vixenwithaplot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,942Chapters: 49/50Kudos: 208

Summary: Gotham never slept.Its skyline cut sharp against clouds, alive with whispers of shadows and secrets.Somewhere beneath that pulse, a girl arrived—carrying dreams, sketches, and the faint echo of a world she left behind.She didn’t know it yet, but her presence tugged at the city itself, stirring currents unseen.Across the streets, a boy moved through shadows, precise and silent, trained to see everything yet notice nothing… until now.He didn’t see her. Not yet.But the air changed where she walked.A thread of magic hummed between worlds, delicate yet unbreakable.Destiny had begun to weave.Two souls, bound by threads, claws, and stars,were about to meet.And the city, as always, watched.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Fragile Threads
entry.summary:
Author: heqvenlymoons

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,276Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 72

Summary: It somehow got out that Marinette Dupain-Cheng has been living with the elusive Waynes. Seeing a new and easy target to make Bruce Wayne finally pay the ransom, Joker kidnaps Marinette and holds her hostage at a warehouse. In his desperation to save the most tolerable person in the manor after Alfred, Damian—as Robin—confronts Joker at the warehouse without a plan, resulting in them both dying in an explosion. Due to unforeseen circumstances, Damian finds himself stuck in a seemingly endless time loop where he is forced to relive the moments leading up to Marinette’s death. [SPORADIC UPDATES]

entry.summary:
Author: DarlingFriend

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 902Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

entry.title: Of Mortal Desires
entry.summary:
Author: Jinx-Jade (Trial_and_Error)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,465Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 164

Summary: After years of relentless battles, Marinette finds herself adrift and weary in the aftermath of Hawkmoth’s defeat. By a twist of fate, she ends up in a new city, leaving behind the tangible reminders of her trauma in pursuit of a genuine fresh start. University life brings new friendships and, unexpectedly, sweeps her into a whirlwind romance with someone who understands all too well the scars left by a childhood of being forged into a weapon. Through newfound honesty and boundaries rarely granted to them before, the former child heroes slowly begin to heal; together.

entry.title: Fate or Chance
entry.summary:
Author: Stephanie_Hearthlight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 106,526Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 3,270

Summary: The sweet irony almost makes Marinette laugh.And to think that the little Parisian had to leave the city of love and reach the city of crime to find true love.Damian, on the other hand, didn't know who to blame.He only knew that he had fallen before the spell of that pair of blue eyes that did not come out of his mind, bringing light to the darkest city in America.Marinette is, despite being hurt, a kind heroine whose soul is as pure as an angel.Damien is generally sullen with everyone. A vigilante who learned what human relationships mean a little late. As fierce as a demon.None of them knows exactly how, but they find their other half in the least likely person.Fate, chance or ...?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Good Luck Bad Luck
entry.summary:
Author: Trashy_Raco0ns

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,339Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 65

Summary: Selina is Marinette's guardian in Paris for better or for worse. Selina moves them back to Gotham so Marinette can get a fresh start from her memories in Paris. Marinette follows in Selinas footsteps. Damian investigates a string of cat-burglaries, whilst trying to ignore the feelings he grows for his new, very confusing classmate. Bruce is trying to be a good dad. Plagg is very supportive of Marinette's wrong doings.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Wrong Number
entry.summary:
Author: Butterflykingdom33

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,496Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 379

Summary: It was just any other day but was it really, Gina Dupain was meeting an old friend at Wayne manor and that old friend happened to be Bruce Wayne. The two had noticed their child or grandchild's lonely life with barely any friends.The two had a scheme ready to begin and with the help of Alfred who had agreed that both Marinette Dupain Cheng and Damian Wayne could use a friend in their lives to bring some interest and mystery into each other's lives.After all, they were two different people behind the screen that were given the wrong number. So would one wrong number lead to the start of a new friendship or just one short conversation?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Welcome to gotham- Say cheese
entry.summary:
Author: Lordofthetags

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,324Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 415

Summary: Robin’s eyes narrow. “You froze. You’re not from here.”“Paris,” she murmurs. “I just landed.”Something flickers behind his expression. Curiosity. Recognition.“I’m Marinette.”“...Robin.”

entry.title: When the Crown Falls
entry.summary:
Author: heqvenlymoons

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,300Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 199

Summary: Lila once had an empire. She used to be great. Revered by her peers. But her empire fell on its own when she pushed the wrong people. Or: Get front row seats to Lila’s downfall. No tickets needed, but for the best experience, show up with popcorn.

entry.title: Misplaced Miracles
entry.summary:
Author: Almoostalive

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,176Chapters: 7/40Kudos: 68

Summary: Dhalia Wayne, daughter to the Bat, heir of assassins, was never meant to be part of a love story. She is discipline, control, and consequence. The kind of force that ends things, not begins them. Love was never in the equation. Until Marcel Dupain-Cheng The boy from Paris is everything Gotham rejects—effortless charm, quiet confidence, and a presence that turns heads without trying. He belongs to a city that believes in love, not one that punishes it. ——————————————————————- Who would have thought? Falling for a boy from the City of Love… in the crime capital of the world. And that? That is the kind of irony Gotham was not prepared to hold.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
